form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.02) at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 7 lengths. Has three wins and four placings from 12 starts from the draw. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.02) at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 7 lengths. Has three wins and four placings from 12 starts from the draw. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led for much of the way before being grabbed late, finishing a 4.5 lengths third at Shepparton over 450m in 26.08. Has run slick time here with a 19.33 PB at the distance. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on April 8 over 300m at this track behind Sailaway Gin beaten a neck (17.11). Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last time. Follow up.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 350m. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (24.31) over 425m at Bendigo. Drawn awkwardly. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 10 over 350m at this track behind Bonded beaten 2.5 lengths (19.76) in a Grade 5. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (26.28) over 460m at Warragul. Drawn out wide and appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Paw Farok at this track last start over 350m (19.66). Right in the mix.
